name: chr22_22q11_21_LCR22C_breakpoint_cluster
description: LCR22-C, a ~250 kb SD block at chr22:20.7-20.95 Mb (GRCh38). Distal breakpoint of the nested A-C (~2.0 Mb) DiGeorge deletion subtype. Contains GGT/USP18/BCRP modules at >99% identity with LCR22-A/B/D.

architecture.internal_structure: GGT/USP18/BCRP paralog modules; intermediate size between LCR22-B and LCR22-D.
